events.text:
>
```json
{
  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "medium",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "No quantity takeoff or area count provided to verify completeness against scope",
    "No photos or specific defect descriptions provided for evaluation",
    "Cannot verify EMT bend radii, support spacing, or fill compliance without visual evidence"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Submit quantity takeoff and area count for the EMT scope",
    "Provide photos showing bends, supports, couplings, and box terminations",
    "Verify NEC Art. 358 bend radius and support requirements in the field",
    "Confirm conduit fill per NEC Chapter 9 tables"
  ],
  "rationale": "The scenario states the submitted package lacks the quantity takeoff needed to score the checkpoint, and no specific photos or defects are described. Without visual evidence or quantities, a pass/fail determination on EMT bending and installation cannot be made. The work stage is acknowledged as rough-complete, but completion percentage and compliance are unverifiable.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 358 - Electrical Metallic Tubing",
    "NEC Chapter 9 - Tables for Conduit Fill"
  ]
}
```
